fields.name: usn
fields.label: USN
fields.description: Format: 1SI21CS001 — digit, 2 letters, 2 digits, 2 letters, 3 digits

fields.name: full_name
fields.label: Full Name
fields.description: Full name as per official records, letters and spaces only

fields.name: first_name
fields.label: First Name
fields.description: Letters only, no spaces

fields.name: middle_name
fields.label: Middle Name
fields.description: Letters only, no spaces (optional)

fields.name: last_name
fields.label: Last Name
fields.description: Letters only, no spaces

fields.name: department
fields.label: Department / Branch
fields.description: Select your current department or branch

fields.name: pursuing_degree
fields.label: Pursuing Degree
fields.description: Select the degree you are currently pursuing

fields.name: mobile_number
fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.description: Enter 10-digit number without +91 or spaces

fields.name: whatsapp_number
fields.label: WhatsApp Number
fields.description: Enter 10-digit WhatsApp number without +91 or spaces

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.description: Select your gender

fields.name: dob
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: Select your date of birth as per official records

fields.name: ug_pg
fields.label: Education Level
fields.description: Select UG if pursuing Bachelor's, PG if pursuing Master's

fields.name: mentor_id
fields.label: Mentor ID
fields.description: Your assigned faculty mentor's ID (if known)

fields.name: father_name
fields.label: Father's Name
fields.description: Letters and spaces only

fields.name: father_mobile_number
fields.label: Father's Mobile Number
fields.description: Enter 10-digit number without +91 or spaces

fields.name: father_occupation
fields.label: Father's Occupation
fields.description: Enter father's current occupation or profession

fields.name: mother_name
fields.label: Mother's Name
fields.description: Letters and spaces only

fields.name: mother_mobile_number
fields.label: Mother's Mobile Number
fields.description: Enter 10-digit number without +91 or spaces

fields.name: mother_occupation
fields.label: Mother's Occupation
fields.description: Enter mother's current occupation or profession

fields.name: communication_address
fields.label: Communication Address
fields.description: Current address where you can be reached

fields.name: permanent_address
fields.label: Permanent Address
fields.description: Permanent residential address as per official records

fields.name: native_place
fields.label: Native Place
fields.description: City or town of origin, letters and spaces only

fields.name: state
fields.label: State
fields.description: State of residence, letters and spaces only

fields.name: pin_code
fields.label: PIN Code
fields.description: Enter 6-digit postal PIN code

fields.name: pan_number
fields.label: PAN Number
fields.description: Format: ABCDE1234F — 5 uppercase letters, 4 digits, 1 uppercase letter

fields.name: aadhar_number
fields.label: Aadhar Number
fields.description: Enter 12-digit Aadhaar number without spaces or dashes

fields.name: sslc_perc
fields.label: SSLC Percentage
fields.description: Enter percentage (e.g. 85.5), not CGPA

fields.name: sslc_meta.year_of_passing
fields.label: SSLC Year of Passing
fields.description: Enter 4-digit year (e.g. 2019)

fields.name: sslc_meta.board
fields.label: SSLC Board
fields.description: e.g. CBSE, ICSE, Karnataka State Board

fields.name: puc_perc
fields.label: PUC Percentage
fields.description: Enter percentage (e.g. 78.4), not CGPA

fields.name: puc_meta.year_of_passing
fields.label: PUC Year of Passing
fields.description: Enter 4-digit year (e.g. 2021)

fields.name: puc_meta.board
fields.label: PUC Board
fields.description: e.g. CBSE, ICSE, Karnataka Pre-University Board

fields.name: admission_mode
fields.label: Admission Mode
fields.description: Select how you were admitted to this institution

fields.name: competitive_ranking
fields.label: Competitive Ranking
fields.description: Your rank in CET, COMED-K or equivalent exam (optional)

fields.name: current_cgpa
fields.label: Current CGPA
fields.description: Enter your latest CGPA on a 10-point scale (e.g. 8.5)

fields.name: active_backlogs
fields.label: Active Backlogs
fields.description: Enter 0 if you have no active backlogs

fields.name: backlog_history
fields.label: Backlog History
fields.description: Select Yes if you have had backlogs in any past semester

fields.name: gap_info.has_gap
fields.label: Education Gap
fields.description: Select Yes if there was a gap year in your education

fields.name: gap_info.gap_years
fields.label: Gap Years
fields.description: Number of gap years (leave blank if no gap)

fields.name: sgpas.0
fields.label: Semester 1 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.1
fields.label: Semester 2 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.2
fields.label: Semester 3 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.3
fields.label: Semester 4 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.4
fields.label: Semester 5 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.5
fields.label: Semester 6 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.6
fields.label: Semester 7 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: sgpas.7
fields.label: Semester 8 SGPA
fields.description: SGPA on a 10-point scale, leave blank if not completed

fields.name: ug_percentage
fields.label: UG Percentage
fields.description: Enter your UG final percentage (e.g. 72.3)

fields.name: pg_specialization
fields.label: PG Specialization
fields.description: Select your PG specialization stream

fields.name: previous_edu_details.ug_university
fields.label: UG University
fields.description: Full name of your undergraduate university (optional)

fields.name: previous_edu_details.year_of_passing
fields.label: UG Year of Passing
fields.description: Enter 4-digit year (e.g. 2022)

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: Resume URL
fields.description: Paste a publicly accessible Google Drive or OneDrive link. Make sure sharing is set to 'Anyone with the link can view'

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: 10th Marks Card URL
fields.description: Upload your SSLC / 10th marks card and paste the shareable link here

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: 12th Marks Card URL
fields.description: Upload your PUC / 12th marks card and paste the shareable link here

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: UG Marks Cards URL
fields.description: Upload all semester UG marks cards as a single PDF/folder and paste the shareable link (optional)

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: PG Marks Cards URL
fields.description: Upload all semester PG marks cards as a single PDF/folder and paste the shareable link (optional)

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: PAN Card URL
fields.description: Upload a clear scan or photo of your PAN card and paste the shareable link (optional)

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: Aadhaar Card URL
fields.description: Upload a clear scan or photo of your Aadhaar card and paste the shareable link

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: Passport Size Photo URL
fields.description: Upload a recent passport-size photo (white/light background) and paste the shareable link

fields.name: document_url
fields.label: College ID Card URL
fields.description: Upload a scan or photo of your current college ID card and paste the shareable link

fields.name: company_name
fields.label: Company Name
fields.description: Full legal name of the company (e.g. Infosys Ltd, Google LLC)

fields.name: salary_lpa
fields.label: Salary (LPA)
fields.description: Annual CTC in Lakhs Per Annum (e.g. 6.5)

fields.name: offer_letter_url
fields.label: Offer Letter Link
fields.description: Upload your offer letter and paste a shareable Google Drive / OneDrive link

fields.name: is_accepted
fields.label: Accepted By You?
fields.description: Select Yes only if you have formally accepted this offer
